column1: # Tempo — BA Feed  (append-only handoff to "Tempo — Feedback (Live)")
# WHY THIS FILE EXISTS
#   Claude (the builder) cannot write to the Google Sheet directly — the Google
#   connector is read-only for existing sheets. So instead of pasting rows into
#   chat for Akram to courier, Claude APPENDS a row here and commits it every time
#   an item ships. This file is the single source the sync agent reads.
# AGENT INSTRUCTIONS  (the "chat" / sync agent)
#   1. On each run, read this file. Rows with sync=NO are un-synced.
#   2. For each sync=NO row, add it to the correct tab in the Live sheet:
#        - type = Feature            -> FEATURES tab
#        - type = Bug / Improvement  -> FEEDBACK tab
#      Map columns by NAME (see header rows below), not by position.
#   3. After a row lands in the sheet, flip its sync field NO -> YES (edit in place,
#      commit "chore(ba-feed): mark synced"). Never delete rows — this is the audit log.
#   4. The sheet auto-computes the dashboard (Total / %Done / Needs input / SLA).
#      Do NOT touch the dashboard tab; only append to FEATURES / FEEDBACK.
# FORMAT: tab-separated. Lines starting with # are comments/headers and are NOT rows.
# Do not reorder or rename columns. One row per finished item.
# ==== FEATURES rows ====  columns: sync
#F
F
column6: Softened the alarming red to warm coral, swapped the confusing violet to slate-blue, and added an icon per status so colour-blind users are not relying on colour alone.
